message:
chore: code quality improvements — const fn promotions, panic docs, idiomatic sort

test_observability.rs:
- Add `# Panics` doc sections to `ScenarioId::new` and `ArtifactBundle::new`
  documenting the assertions on empty/non-path-safe suite/case strings
- Promote `TruthContext::with_phase`, `with_reconnect_event`, and
  `with_cancellation_event` to `const fn` — these are pure field setters
  with no runtime overhead, enabling compile-time construction

truth.rs:
- Replace `sort_by(|a, b| b.severity.cmp(&a.severity))` with idiomatic
  `sort_by_key(|f| std::cmp::Reverse(f.severity))` in
  `RemediationOutput::sort_by_severity` — clearer intent, eliminates
  manual comparison inversion

main.rs:
- Add `#[allow(dead_code)]` to `truth` module with explanatory comment
  noting types are planned for mesh-native integration but not yet wired
  to dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
